---
title: "STICs"
author: "CLB"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r}
#| include: false
#| echo: false

library(tidyverse)
library(tidygraph)
library(data.table)
library(ggthemes)
library(here)
library(sf)
library(streamDAG)
library(furrr)
library(future)
library(riverdist)
library(sfnetworks)
library(gganimate)
source(here("Code/paths+packages.R"))
library(mapview)
library(cli)
library(whitebox)
wbt_init(exe_path = "~/WBT/whitebox_tools")
# EPSG for NAD83 / UTM zone 14N
UTM_14N <- 26914
```

# Streams and Sites

```{r}
# knzS <- st_read("~/Desktop/AIMS_GreatPlains.gpkg", layer = "Streams") |> 
#   st_transform(crs = 4326)

# Load sites
gpSites <- st_read("~/Dropbox/AIMS/GIS/Results/AIMS_GreatPlains.gpkg", layer = "Sites") |> 
  filter(watershed %in% c("KNZ", "SHN", "YMR")) |> 
  st_transform(crs = 4326) |> 
  mutate(
    lon = st_coordinates(geom)[, "X"],
    lat  = st_coordinates(geom)[, "Y"]
  ) 

seSites <- st_read("~/Dropbox/AIMS/GIS/Results/AIMS_SouthEast.gpkg", layer = "sites") |> 
  filter(!sublocation == "HW") |> 
  st_transform(4326) |>
  mutate(
    lon = st_coordinates(geom)[, 1],
    lat = st_coordinates(geom)[, 2]
  ) 

mwSites <- st_read("~/Dropbox/AIMS/GIS/Results/AIMS_MountainWest.gpkg", layer = "Sites") |> 
  st_transform(4326) |> 
  mutate(
    lon = st_coordinates(geom)[, 1],
    lat = st_coordinates(geom)[, 2]
  ) 

```

```{r}
# Select and align columns
gpSites <- gpSites |>
  select(siteId, watershed, lon, lat, geom)

seSites <- seSites |>
  select(siteId, watershed, lon, lat, geom)

mwSites <- mwSites |>
  select(siteId, watershed, lon, lat, geom)

# Combine all into one
allSites <- bind_rows(gpSites, seSites, mwSites)
allSites <- allSites |> 
  filter(siteId %in% c("SFM01", "SHM01", "ENM01", "TLM01", "WHM01", "PRM01", "GSS01", "DSS01", "JSS01"))
```

# Open ET

```{r}
library(httr2)
library(jsonlite)


download_openet_et <- function(
  api_key,
  lon, lat,
  start_date = "2020-01-01",
  end_date = "2020-12-31",
  interval = "daily",
  model = "Ensemble",
  variable = "ET"
) {
  url <- "https://openet-api.org/raster/timeseries/point"
  
  body <- list(
    date_range = list(start_date, end_date),
    interval = interval,
    geometry = list(lon, lat),
    model = model,
    variable = variable,
    reference_et = "gridMET",
    units = "mm",
    file_format = "JSON"
  )
  
  response <- request(url) |>
    req_method("POST") |>
    req_headers(
      Authorization = api_key,
      Accept = "application/json",
      `Content-Type` = "application/json"
    ) |>
    req_body_json(body) |>
    req_perform()
  
  # Check for HTTP error
  if (httr2::resp_status(response) >= 400) {
    error_details <- tryCatch({
      httr2::resp_body_json(response)$detail
    }, error = function(e) {
      httr2::resp_body_string(response)
    })
    stop(sprintf("OpenET API request failed [%d]: %s",
                 httr2::resp_status(response), error_details))
  }

  result <- httr2::resp_body_json(response)
  
  tibble::tibble(
    Date = as.Date(sapply(result, `[[`, "time")),
    ET_mm = as.numeric(sapply(result, `[[`, "et"))
  )
}


api_key <- "NMWBgqRcOSktIVd3cWnv3uP5IjdGWGIfDIWRLtgOrTVyx1LtxC9uXeHi3JCW"
start_date <- "2021-01-01"
end_date <- "2025-01-01"


et_all <- allSites |>
  st_drop_geometry() |> 
  mutate(
    et_data = pmap(
      list(lon, lat),
      \(lon, lat) {
        tryCatch({
          download_openet_et(
            api_key = api_key,
            lon = lon,
            lat = lat,
            start_date = start_date,
            end_date = end_date,
            interval = "daily"
          )
        }, error = function(e) {
          warning(paste("Download failed for", lon, lat, ":", e$message))
          NULL
        })
      }
    )
  ) |>
  select(siteId, watershed, et_data) |>
  unnest(et_data)

et_all <- et_all |> 
  select(Site = watershed, Date, ET_1d = ET_mm)

et_all |>
  ggplot(aes(x = Date, y = ET_1d)) +
  geom_line() +
  facet_wrap(~ Site, scales = "free_y") +
  labs(
    title = "OpenET",
    x = "Date",
    y = "ET (mm/day)"
  ) +
  theme_few()
```

```{r}
library(slider)

et_all_means <- et_all |>
  arrange(Site, Date) |>
  group_by(Site) |>
  mutate(
    ET_7d = slide_dbl(ET_1d, mean, .before = 6, .complete = TRUE),
    ET_14d = slide_dbl(ET_1d, mean, .before = 13, .complete = TRUE),
    ET_30d = slide_dbl(ET_1d, mean, .before = 29, .complete = TRUE),
    ET_60d = slide_dbl(ET_1d, mean, .before = 59, .complete = TRUE)
  ) |>
  ungroup()
```

```{r}
modisET <- read_csv(here("Data/ET/MODIS_ET.csv")) |> 
  select(siteId = ID, Date, ET_1d = MOD16A2GF_061_ET_500m) |> 
  left_join(allSites |> st_drop_geometry() |> select(siteId, watershed)) |> 
  select(Site = watershed, Date, ET_1d)

modisET_daily <- modisET |>
  group_by(Site) |>
  # Fill in daily date sequence per Site
  complete(Date = seq(min(Date), max(Date), by = "day")) |>
  arrange(Site, Date) |>
  # Carry forward Site name (since complete() introduces NAs)
  fill(Site, .direction = "downup") |>
  group_split() |>
  map_dfr(\(df) {
    df$ET_1d <- approx(x = df$Date, y = df$ET_1d, xout = df$Date)$y
    df
  })

modisET_daily <- modisET_daily |>
  arrange(Site, Date) |>
  group_by(Site) |>
  mutate(
    ET_7d = slide_dbl(ET_1d, mean, .before = 6, .complete = TRUE),
    ET_14d = slide_dbl(ET_1d, mean, .before = 13, .complete = TRUE),
    ET_30d = slide_dbl(ET_1d, mean, .before = 29, .complete = TRUE),
    ET_60d = slide_dbl(ET_1d, mean, .before = 59, .complete = TRUE)
  ) |>
  ungroup() |> 
  write_csv(here("Data/ET/MODIS_Daily_ET.csv"))

modisET_daily |>
  ggplot(aes(x = Date, y = ET_1d)) +
  geom_line() +
  facet_wrap(~ Site, scales = "free_y") +
  labs(
    title = "MODIS ET",
    x = "Date",
    y = "ET (mm/day)"
  ) +
  theme_few()
```

## 

```{r}

```

```{r}

```
